stops.name: Mobil
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass development-time amenity query centered on the coeur_d_alene_id_us endpoint city's own coordinates; curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck access: No verified truck access: OpenStreetMap records no hgv allowance, truck parking, or truck-stop classification at this location (checked 2026-07-19). Generic fuel stations default to bobtail_only per the truck-accessibility policy.
